arts.ttl: Reading midfielder still 'a few weeks' from League One return after thigh injury
arts.sum: Reading midfielder Ben Elliott has returned to training after having surgery on his thigh, but is still 'a few weeks away' from a return says manager Noel Hunt. The 22-year-old was a star performer in the early months of the season, visibly growing in stature and confidence from his role last season. However, the Chelsea youngster needed surgery on his thigh in December and has not featured in the last few months. Unlikely to feature until April, the Royals will still hope to have faint hopes of the play-offs alive for his return.
